content: Dianping's "Must-Eat List" addresses a trust crisis in China's food recommendation ecosystem, where influencer extortion and fake reviews have led restaurants to reject bloggers entirely. title: 肥波 5 这个模型感觉训练方向有点怪啊
content: A user compared two AI models while trying to add an auto-map-clearing feature to a Steam game. GPT-5.5 failed after two hours of asking repeated confirmation questions about decompiling and modifying files. Fable 5 completed the task in one shot: it found the game unencrypted, decompiled it, switched to a plugin approach when direct modification proved difficult, and succeeded without any bugs or confirmations. The user notes Fable 5 aggressively guesses user intent and autonomously acts to complete tasks, which feels powerful but somewhat unsettling—suggesting why Anthropic applies strict safety guardrails.

title: 嘲笑别人的 deepseek 偷跑 100 元后，我被偷跑了 2700 元
content: A developer mocked another user for a stolen DeepSeek API key, then suffered the same fate—losing 2,700 yuan, 27 times more. Their backup LLM provider, a Hangzhou company, saw sudden usage spikes in June due to a stolen key generating 500 million tokens of random translations from a Beijing IP. The company's four API keys followed a sequential UUID pattern; suspiciously, the provider had just overhauled its key system with 100+ character keys and unique base URLs. Despite investigating staff, code security, and servers, no breach source was identified.

title: 1999元的AI戒指，能干掉你的键盘吗？
content: Oasis Devices launched the OASIS 1, a $289 AI smart ring that captures whispered speech and converts it to text via Wispr Flow, targeting users who can't type or speak aloud. It features a 2D touchpad for gesture-based corrections. However, the device faces criticism for poor 16-hour battery life, social awkwardness, and inefficient touchpad editing compared to keyboards. The product reflects a broader Silicon Valley trend toward voice-first computing, with companies like Ramp and Gusto encouraging employees to dictate rather than type. Despite selling out its first batch, the ring is seen as an imperfect transitional device in the uncertain "post-keyboard" era.

title: 港湾观点︱2026年6月：时代奔流的动力与颠簸
content: AI semiconductor markets experienced high volatility in June 2026 due to three disconnections: slow value realization from traditional enterprise AI adoption versus massive hyperscaler capex; unrealistically high semiconductor revenue expectations requiring $2-3 trillion annual investment that non-hyperscalers cannot fund; and divergent valuations between semiconductor suppliers and demand-side customers. However, systemic collapse is unlikely due to stronger fundamentals than the 2000 dot-com era. Four enduring drivers propel AI forward: evolving token intelligence through autonomous agent loops; declining per-token costs via hardware iteration and caching; improving token economics enabling viable business models; and intense competition accelerating innovation despite bubble risks.

title: 尼布楚的两幅地图：中国新地图的世界故事 | 原文
content: In 1689 Sino-Russian negotiations at Nerchinsk, each side presented different maps: the Qing envoy used General Langtan's "Jilin Jiuhe Tu," while the Russians used Nicolaas Witsen's 1687 Dutch map "Nieuwe Lantkaarte van het Noorder en Ooster deel van Asia en Europa." These contrasting cartographic representations illustrate how geographical knowledge was politically contested during early modern border diplomacy between China and Russia.

title: Fable 5被网友薅出省钱神招，最高减70%
content: A GitHub project called pxpipe exploits pricing differences in Fable 5 by converting text context into dense PNG images, reducing token costs by 59-70%. The tool acts as a local proxy, compressing bulky inputs like system prompts and tool documentation into images that the model reads via its vision channel. While effective for semantic understanding, the method risks errors with precise strings. The approach builds on earlier research like Google's 2022 CLIPPO paper and DeepSeek-OCR, demonstrating that text rendered as pixels can substitute for direct token input.

title: 别急着买新 MacBook ，苹果还藏着 AI 时代杀手锏
content: Apple plans major MacBook redesigns through 2028. A high-end touchscreen MacBook Ultra with OLED displays and Dynamic Island (replacing the notch) launches late 2026 with M5 Pro/Max chips. M6 chips, using TSMC's 2nm process, will power entry-level MacBook Pros, iPad Pros, and MacBook Airs as a transitional generation without Pro/Max variants. Apple's focus is M7 (2027), designed for on-device AI with enhanced neural engines and 240GB/s memory bandwidth. The company aims to strengthen local AI processing, reduce cloud costs, and potentially expand into data center chips, while securing advanced TSMC production capacity amid competition from AI companies.

title: 极为先进的 3.5mm 耳机孔，谁带头取消的
content: The 3.5mm headphone jack's removal began with HTC G1 in 2008, but Apple mainstreamed the trend with 2017's iPhone 7, prompting Android manufacturers to follow suit. While officially justified by waterproofing and space savings, companies primarily sought to eliminate a royalty-free universal standard and create proprietary wireless ecosystems offering billion-dollar revenue streams. A decade later, wired headphones are resurging due to superior audio quality, zero latency, reliability, freedom from charging needs, loss prevention, and fashion appeal among youth rejecting manufacturer-enforced obsolescence.

title: 感觉 AI 推理目前瓶颈还是比较明显
content: Current AI reasoning remains limited. Despite theoretical 1M context windows, most developers still use around 256K. Different KV cache implementations likely cause inconsistent detail retention across models—explaining why some bugs are caught by one model but missed by another. Intelligence can be trained, but cache optimization takes time and may initially increase hallucinations. Users still need deep expertise; AI serves as a compliant assistant rather than replacing skilled workers.

title: AI 砍掉的第一批大厂人：高薪，高绩效，高P｜深氪
content: Chinese tech firms are conducting large-scale layoffs by mid-2025, with June 30 as a common deadline, driven by AI-driven efficiency gains, stagnant legacy businesses, and AI investment costs. Junior programmers face disproportionate cuts due to lower severance costs and slower AI adoption, while high performers and senior staff are also vulnerable. Companies like Meituan, Alibaba, and Baidu are merging roles, pushing token usage metrics, and flattening hierarchies. Many laid-off workers are turning to startups, manufacturing, or entrepreneurship as traditional tech career paths erode.

title: 刚刚，DeepMind经典巨作再封神，ICML 2026大奖公布
content: ICML 2026 announced its awards in Seoul, with two diffusion model papers winning Outstanding Papers. One from Tsinghua researchers debunks the core premise of arbitrary-order generation in diffusion language models, while another improves sampling precision. The Outstanding Position Paper critiques AI alignment research for unintentionally building censorship infrastructure. DeepMind's 2016 A3C paper received the Test of Time Award. Six honorable mentions covered RLVR honesty, video generation, memorization limits, and grokking in ridge regression. The awards signal diffusion models maturing and AI safety facing internal scrutiny.

title: 恶意诱导！Meta竟雇外包，伪装未成年人，给ChatGPT和Gemini投毒下套 | 原文
content: Meta secretly ran "Project Cannes," hiring contractors to pose as minors and submit harmful prompts to rival AI services including ChatGPT, Gemini, and Character.AI. The operation generated 45,000 extreme queries per round using fake accounts of children aged 13 and younger, asking about self-harm, violence, and eating disorders. Conducted through contractor Covalen and active until April 2026, the project was not disclosed to competitors. The scheme was revealed by WIRED amid broader concerns about Meta's competitive practices and privacy violations.

title: 狂揽2.4万星标：一行命令，AI会自己找技能了
content: Vercel launched "skills," a package manager for AI agents that installs capabilities via one command (`npx skills add <package>`). The tool supports 68+ agents including Claude Code and Cursor, letting users share project-specific conventions as reusable skill packages. A "Find Skills" feature enables AI to search and install matching skills automatically. However, security audits reveal significant risks: over 36% of skills contain flaws, with 13.4% rated severe, including malware and credential theft—posing greater dangers than traditional npm packages since skills merge prompts, code, and system permissions.

title: 年入1亿美元，两个90后伯克利室友，搞出最赚钱的AI生意
content: Arena, a UC Berkeley-born AI model evaluation platform, reached $100 million annualized revenue just eight months after launching its commercial service. Founded by two Berkeley roommates and professor Ion Stoica, the company spun out in 2025 with a $100 million seed round at $600 million valuation, followed by a $150 million Series A at $1.7 billion. Arena's core product is a blind-test leaderboard where users compare anonymous AI responses, generating over 82 million votes. Its paid "AI Evaluations" service lets companies pay for deep, real-world performance analysis of their models using Arena's community. The platform has evolved from chatbot rankings to evaluating AI agents on complex tasks like coding and research.

title: Token吃掉三成工资，硅谷AI账单失控了
content: SemiAnalysis reports AI token costs now comprise 30% of employee salaries but generate multiples of previous human output. NVIDIA's Huang plans massive token budgets for all engineers. Meanwhile, Uber and Microsoft struggle with runaway AI spending despite unclear productivity gains. MIT research found AI automation economically viable in only 23% of vision-related jobs. However, SemiAnalysis argues costs are collapsing: software and hardware optimizations achieve 14-32x throughput improvements, with model gross margins expanding structurally. Gartner predicts 90% inference cost reduction by 2030. Despite $740 billion in global AI capital expenditure, Goldman Sachs notes minimal macroeconomic impact so far.

title: 缅甸电诈园记录流出：电诈人员使用美国AI同时和100多人聊天，上百种语言实时翻译，星链重返园区头号网络服务商 | 原文
content: Leaked records from Myanmar scam compounds reveal fraudsters using US AI to chat with over 100 people simultaneously with real-time translation in hundreds of languages. A trafficked Indian worker reportedly impersonated dozens of identities, contacting 50,000 targets from 17 countries in one month. Starlink has become the top internet provider for these compounds, with US ISPs carrying nearly one-fifth of their traffic. Experts warn global fraud is becoming fully automated, eliminating the need for human scammers.

content: Speculative decoding's acceleration depends heavily on batch size. At batch size 1 (latency priority), the target model is memory-bound with significant GPU compute underutilization. Speculative decoding mitigates this by bundling multiple tokens into a single forward pass, increasing arithmetic intensity toward compute-bound operation, yielding the most significant speedup.

title: 详细谈谈DSpark投机解码的原理(1) | 原文
content: DSpark is DeepSeek's open-source speculative decoding framework addressing two key bottlenecks: draft quality degradation and inefficient verification. Current draft models generate candidate tokens quickly but lack contextual dependency, causing declining quality and acceptance rates in later tokens. Additionally, blindly feeding entire long drafts to target models for verification wastes computational resources regardless of actual draft quality.

title: [从零到一] 一个小尝试，在小红书赚到 3000 元，实战分享
content: A seller with basic 3D printing skills replicated a trending egg-tray fridge magnet on Xiaohongshu, launching May 20 with a presale model. Sales began immediately, then spiked to 50 daily orders after a user's viral video. However, Yiwu merchants soon flooded platforms with cheaper copycats using inferior materials, crashing prices from 16 to 5 yuan. Despite 150 orders at 28-38 yuan and 3,000 yuan profit, the seller couldn't scale production or create viral content, illustrating how individual makers lose to industrial competitors in short-lifecycle products.

title: 开源了 gitb — Rust 多仓库 git 工具，批量操作，超快！
content: gitb is a Rust-based multi-repository Git tool designed for batch operations. It allows users to check status across all repositories, pull updates in parallel with configurable jobs, and run health checks. The tool is approximately three times faster than the Python-based alternative gita, completing pulls across 50 repositories in 1.2 seconds versus 4.5 seconds. It automatically handles uncommitted changes by stashing before pulling and popping afterward to avoid conflicts.

title: 单个 HTML 静态文件网页版 ACME 客户端，已升级支持申请 Let's Encrypt 的 IP 证书（IPv4、IPv6），手动简单操作即可申请到证书，域名可用 ZeroSSL、Google Trust Services
content: An HTML-based ACME client supports Let's Encrypt IP certificates (IPv4/IPv6) alongside domain certificates from ZeroSSL and Google Trust Services. Users manually enter an IP, select the "shortlived" profile, generate keys, place a verification file on the server, and download the certificate upon validation. Pure IP certificates have empty common names, as Let's Encrypt rejects CSRs with IP-based CN values. Certificates can combine multiple IPs and domains. Browser compatibility varies: Let's Encrypt works directly; ZeroSSL requires a workaround for header access; Google Trust Services needs additional steps due to restrictive CORS and CSP policies.
